{{Infobox construct
| name = Remnant hand
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] has a [[Remnant hand]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c12">''Ghostwater'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] uses his [[Remnant hand]] to hold on to the [[dragon]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] uses his [[Remnant hand]] to catch [[Daji]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12">''Wintersteel'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A beam of golden light sank into [[Lindon]]'s [[Remnant hand]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
